steps.title: Spot the concessive signal
steps.content: The word “while” introduces a concessive clause that notes mass extinctions seem abrupt in geological terms.

steps.title: Match the concessive logic
steps.content:
The underlined phrase concedes that mass extinctions can seem abrupt when viewed on a geological timescale. The information that follows then clarifies that, from another point of view, these events still unfold over thousands or millions of years.

Choice B captures that shift in perspective. The phrase does not support the CO₂-cause claim, expand uncertainty about bivalves, or introduce an unresolved research question.
B is correct.
